message.content:
You are implementing Tasks 21-23 (PWA + Placeholders + Build Test) for the RoyallAzz project at C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz. This is a Next.js 15 App Router project with TailwindCSS v4, pnpm as package manager. **IMPORTANT CONTEXT:** - The sidebar navigation links to these routes under /merchant/: - /merchant (dashboard - EXISTS) - /merchant/programs (EXISTS) - /merchant/rewards - /merchant/clients - /merchant/qr-codes (EXISTS) - /merchant/scanner - /merchant/campaigns - /merchant/analytics - /merchant/subscription - /merchant/settings - Merchant pages are at `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/` (route group + segment) - Customer layout is at `src/app/(customer)/layout.tsx` - Customer settings link: /customer/settings **YOUR TASKS:** ### Task 21: PWA manifest + Vercel config Create these 3 files: **File: `public/manifest.json`** ```json { "name": "RoyallAzz", "short_name": "RoyallAzz", "description": "Vos cartes de fidélité digitales", "start_url": "/customer", "display": "standalone", "background_color": "#FAFAF8", "theme_color": "#059669", "icons": [ { "src": "/icons/icon-192.png", "sizes": "192x192", "type": "image/png" }, { "src": "/icons/icon-512.png", "sizes": "512x512", "type": "image/png" } ] } ``` **File: `public/sw.js`** ```javascript self.addEventListener('install', () => self.skipWaiting()); self.addEventListener('activate', (e) => e.waitUntil(self.clients.claim())); self.addEventListener('fetch', () => {}); ``` **File: `vercel.json`** ```json { "headers": [ { "source": "/(.*)", "headers": [ { "key": "Strict-Transport-Security", "value": "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" }, { "key": "X-Frame-Options", "value": "DENY" }, { "key": "X-Content-Type-Options", "value": "nosniff" } ] } ] } ``` Also create the `public/icons/` directory (just create it, icons will be added later). Commit: `git add public/manifest.json public/sw.js vercel.json && git commit -m "feat: add PWA manifest, service worker stub, Vercel security headers"` ### Task 22: Placeholder pages Create placeholder pages for ALL remaining sidebar routes that don't have pages yet. Each follows this pattern: ```typescript import PageHeader from '@/components/layout/PageHeader'; export default function PageName() { return (

Bientôt disponible.

); } ``` **IMPORTANT: Merchant placeholder paths must be under `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/` to match the URL structure.** Create these files: 1. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/rewards/page.tsx` — title: "Récompenses", desc: "Gérez les récompenses de vos programmes." 2. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/clients/page.tsx` — title: "Clients", desc: "Consultez et gérez vos clients fidélité." 3. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/scanner/page.tsx` — title: "Scanner", desc: "Scannez les QR codes clients." 4. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/campaigns/page.tsx` — title: "Campagnes", desc: "Créez et gérez vos campagnes marketing." 5. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/analytics/page.tsx` — title: "Analytiques", desc: "Suivez les performances de vos programmes." 6. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/subscription/page.tsx` — title: "Abonnement", desc: "Gérez votre plan et votre facturation." 7. `src/app/(merchant)/merchant/settings/page.tsx` — title: "Paramètres", desc: "Configurez votre compte et vos préférences." 8. `src/app/(customer)/customer/settings/page.tsx` — title: "Mon profil", desc: "Gérez vos informations personnelles." Commit: `git add src/app/ && git commit -m "feat: add placeholder pages for all sidebar routes"` ### Task 23: Build test Run these commands in sequence: 1. `cd C:/Users/User/RoyallAzz && pnpm run typecheck` — must pass with 0 errors 2. `pnpm run build` — must succeed (this is critical, it validates the whole project compiles) If either fails, FIX THE ERRORS and try again. If both pass, do a final commit: `git add -A && git commit -m "chore: verify typecheck and build pass"` **IMPORTANT:** - Do NOT modify any existing files - Only create new files as listed above - The build test is the most critical part — the project MUST build successfully

content.text:
Good. Now I have a clear picture of what exists and what needs to be created. Let me note that `PageHeader` is a `'use client'` component with an `onClick` handler in the `action` prop. Since the placeholder pages don't use the `action` prop, they can remain server components. However, since `PageHeader` is marked `'use client'`, importing it from a server component is fine in Next.js -- the client boundary is at the component level.

Let me now create all the files. I'll start with Task 21 (PWA files) and Task 22 (placeholder pages) in parallel.

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback
